programme.title: Jesse and Lester 1972
programme.desc: In Jesse and Lester, Gianni Garko and Aldo Sambrell star in a Spaghetti Western with a comedic twist. When rough-and-tumble gunman Jesse teams up with mild-mannered preacher Lester, the unlikely duo sets out to claim an inheritance that could change their lives. But standing in their way are outlaws, double-crosses, and plenty of misadventures on the trail. Blending sharp humor, action, and classic Western style, this buddy adventure proves that opposites can make the wildest partners.

programme.title: Law of the Rio Grande 1931
programme.desc: In Law of the Rio Grande, cowboy star Bob Custer rides into a frontier torn by treachery and greed. When outlaws threaten to seize control of the range, he takes a stand to defend justice and protect the innocent. With fast-paced action, thrilling shootouts, and a touch of frontier romance, this early sound-era Western delivers straight-shooting adventure on the rugged Rio Grande.

programme.title: China 9, Liberty 37 (1978)
programme.desc: In China 9, Liberty 37, Fabio Testi stars as a condemned gunfighter offered freedom if he kills an aging rancher (Warren Oates). But when he meets his intended victim—and falls for the rancher’s restless wife (Jenny Agutter)—the deal turns deadly. Torn between passion, loyalty, and survival, the three are swept into a violent showdown where betrayal and desire collide. With raw emotion, striking landscapes, and gritty shootouts, this revisionist Western blurs the line between love and vengeance.

programme.title: Honor Of The Range
programme.desc: After Sheriff Ken puts money in the safe, his brother Clem gives Rawhide the combination. With the money gone the disgruntled townsmen make Boots Sheriff and lock up Ken. Clem, now a prisoner of Rawhide, has a change of heart and sends Ken a message with the outlaw's location. Ken escapes by impersonating the saloon entertainer and rides for the hangout.

His first challenge is to help Cole Weightman - a powerful yet unknown linebacker who reminds many of another great Pittsburgh linebacker — Jack Lambert of the Steelers fame. What lessons and tactics does Jesse have to help Cole get his first offer? And how will Coach Jesse fare when he adventures with Cole and his family? Find out in the premier episode of Country Ball.

programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E1 Lucha
programme.desc: Ian Hodgkinson, known as Vampiro in the world of wrestling, was a famed wrestler in the late 80’s and 90’s. Today, he shifted his career to being behind the scenes as a Story Producer for AAA, the top wrestling company in Lucha Libre. Hodgkinson intimately peels back the curtain on the mysteries of this show, how it’s produced, and what life is like on and off the stage. We dive deep in to the lives of two wrestlers and follow their stories as they prep for their next fight: El Hijo Del Fantasma, an up and coming star who seemingly has it all, as well as Faby Apache, a veteran female wrestler struggling to stay relevant as she raises her son.
